Appearances:
Plaintiff Abbas Fard is present.
Attorney Luis Molina for the plaintiff.
Defendant Saber Abuzahra is present.
Attorney Osama E. Hamdy appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of AUG-25-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
